items.name: Headset Communicator
items.description: Standard SLA encrypted short-range comms with bone-conduction mic/speaker.
items.brp: Enables squad coordination. +10% to cooperative Tactics rolls.

items.name: Klippo Multi-Band Communicator
items.description: Handheld or belt-mounted boosted comm unit with recording.
items.brp: Can patch into Third Eye feeds, Shiver channels, or public bands.

items.name: Vid-Phone (Portable)
items.description: Visual comm device for public/private/SLA channels with video recording.
items.brp: Useful for remote briefings and evidence transmission.

items.name: Oyster Card (ITB Card)
items.description: ID, travel, and banking card with SCL, credits, permits, and biometrics.
stats: Loss can trigger immediate SCL audit
items.brp: Required for official SLA transactions. Electronics (Computer) at -30% to hack.

items.name: Operative Organiser
items.description: Rugged PDA with BPN storage, maps, contacts, and tactical software.
stats: Includes Downtown maps and transit schedules
items.brp: +10% to Navigate (Urban) and Research when consulting stored data.

items.name: BOOPA (Audio)
items.description: Advanced tactical audio suite with threat detection and directional awareness.
items.brp: +20% Listen, negates surprise from audio cues, halves flashbang/sonic effects.

items.name: Environment Scanner (Standard)
items.description: Handheld multi-spectrum scanner for heat, chemicals, radiation, bio, and EM fields.
items.brp: +30% Search for hidden targets/objects. Opposed Stealth for cloaked targets.

items.name: Environment Scanner (Advanced)
items.description: Military-grade scanner with composition analysis, motion tracking, and Ebb sensing.
items.brp: +40% Search. Can identify compounds/agents with no additional kit.

items.name: UV / Multi-Spectrum Torch
items.description: Compact weatherproof torch with white/UV/IR modes.
items.brp: UV reveals bio traces with Forensics. IR halves darkness penalties.

items.name: Binoculars (Standard)
items.description: 8x optical binoculars with waterproof body.
items.brp: Negates Spot range penalties up to 500m.

items.name: Binoculars (Tactical)
items.description: 12x stabilized optics with IR/low-light, rangefinder, and laser designator.
items.brp: Negates Spot range penalties to 2000m. IR works in total darkness.

items.name: Motion Tracker
items.description: Vibration/thermal movement detector with direction and approximate distance.
stats: Poor through thick walls or vs stationary targets
items.brp: Auto-alerts movement in range. +20% to avoid ambush.

items.name: Forensic Kit
items.description: Portable CSI suite with sample tools, reagents, bags, and analysis aids.
items.brp: Required for detailed Forensics; otherwise -30%.

items.name: Lockpick Set (Professional)
items.description: Professional mechanical picks, tension tools, and bypass hardware.
items.brp: Required for Locksmith rolls without penalty; improvised tools impose -20%.

items.name: Electronic Lockpick / Bypass Kit
items.description: Electronic lock override, keycard cloning, and cipher bypass suite.
stats: Military-grade SLA locks may still require specialist access
items.brp: Primary toolkit for electronic breach work.

items.name: BOOPA Medical Kit (Standard)
items.description: Field first-aid set with bandages, antiseptics, coagulants, and hypo tools.
items.brp: Required for First Aid without penalty. KickStart restores 1d3 HP.

items.name: BOOPA Medical Kit (Advanced)
items.description: Enhanced trauma and surgical field kit with scanner/defib/monitoring tools.
stats: Includes KickStart, Splatter, and Bosh doses
items.brp: Required for Medicine without penalty. +10% to First Aid and Medicine.

items.name: Medikit (Disposable Emergency)
items.description: Single-use emergency pack with stimulant and coagulant patch.
items.brp: Allows First Aid at -10%. Restores 1d3 HP.

items.name: Trauma Stabiliser
items.description: Portable life-support unit for critically injured casualties.
stats: Includes oxygen, IV, and vital monitors
items.brp: Auto-stabilises dying characters for 12 hours; Medicine roll to apply optimally.

items.name: Drug Hypo-Spray (Empty)
items.description: Reusable painless delivery system for one drug dose.
items.brp: Administer one dose as a simple combat action.

items.name: Grapple Gun
items.description: Pneumatic launcher with 50m monofilament line and hook options.
items.brp: +20% Climb with secured line. Line breaks on 10+ damage hit.

items.name: Climbing Harness & Gear
items.description: Full harness kit with ascenders, descenders, gloves, and support hardware.
items.brp: Required for serious climbing; without it Climb at -20%.

items.name: Rope (50m, High-Tensile)
items.description: Military climbing rope, weatherproof and squad-capable.
items.brp: +10% Climb with proper rope support.

items.name: Maghold Boots
items.description: Electromagnetic boots for ferrous walls and ceilings.
items.brp: Auto-success Climb on metal surfaces.

items.name: Maghold Gloves
items.description: Electromagnetic palm pads for metallic climbing and gear anchoring.
stats: Attach up to 50kg to ferrous surfaces
items.brp: +30% Climb on metal surfaces.

items.name: MAC Knife (Multi-Application Cutting Tool)
items.description: Heavy-duty folding tool with ceramic blade, cutter, breaker, and pry attachments.
items.brp: Common requirement for Craft/Repair tasks in the field.

items.name: Entrenching Tool
items.description: Folding shovel/pick combo for digging, rubble clearing, and breaching weak cover.
items.brp: Supports fast fieldworks and emergency breaching.

items.name: Tool Kit (General)
items.description: Comprehensive field repair kit for mechanical fixes.
stats: Assorted hand tools, fasteners, tapes, and adhesives
items.brp: Required for Craft (Mechanical)/Repair without penalty. Improvised tools: -30%.

items.name: Tool Kit (Electronics)
items.description: Precision electronics tool set for diagnostics and component work.
stats: Includes multimeter, solder tools, testers, and parts
items.brp: Required for Electronics specialities without penalty.

items.name: Breaching Charge (Frame Charge)
items.description: Adhesive shaped charge with timer/remote detonation for entry operations.
items.brp: Demolitions roll for placement. Standard doors/walls breach automatically.

items.name: Padlock (Heavy Duty)
items.description: Hardened steel padlock resistant to cutting and routine bypass attempts.
items.brp: Reliable low-cost field lock for temporary site security.

items.name: Duct Tape (Roll)
items.description: High-strength adhesive tape, 50m roll.
stats: Improvised restraints: STR vs STR+10 to break
items.brp: Useful for temporary repairs, restraints, and improvised field solutions.

items.name: Cable Ties (Pack of 50)
items.description: Heavy-duty non-metallic restraint ties.
items.brp: Fast detainee handling and bundling utility.

items.name: Flares (Pack of 6)
items.description: Weatherproof chemical flares for illumination, marking, and signalling.
items.brp: Reliable light source and route marker in low-visibility operations.

items.name: Backpack (Operative Issue)
items.description: Waterproof modular military pack.
items.brp: Carries major load without extra encumbrance penalties up to capacity.

items.name: Webbing / Tactical Vest
items.description: Load-bearing vest with utility pouches and mount points.
items.brp: Reload actions take half time with properly arranged ammunition.

items.name: Sleeping Bag (Thermal)
items.description: Insulated bag rated to -20C with waterproof shell.
items.brp: Prevents cold/wet rest penalties during field downtime.

items.name: Ration Pack (1 Week)
items.description: High-calorie long shelf-life field food for one operative (7 days).
items.brp: Prevents starvation. Morale impacts are GM discretion.

items.name: Water Purification Tablets (50)
items.description: Chemical water purification tablets.
items.brp: Prevents disease from dirty water; does not remove heavy toxins/radiological contamination.

items.name: Canteen (2 Litre)
items.description: Durable water container with carry strap.
items.brp: Supports hydration: roughly 1 day normal use, half-day in extreme heat/exertion.

items.name: Ebb Damper
items.description: Localized Ebb suppression field generator.
stats: Detectable by scanners at double range
items.brp: All Ebb rolls in radius at -30%, including the user's own Ebb rolls.

items.name: Power Cell (Standard)
items.description: Rechargeable universal power cell.
items.brp: Baseline backup power source.

items.name: Power Cell (Extended)
items.description: High-capacity universal power cell.
items.brp: Critical for long missions without resupply.

items.name: Recharge Station (Portable)
items.description: Portable charging station for up to 4 cells at once.
items.brp: Field recharging hub when connected to stable power.

items.name: Portable Generator
items.description: Fuel-cell generator for charging and power distribution.
items.brp: Mobile power backbone for remote operations.

items.name: Thermal Blanket (Emergency)
items.description: Single-use reflective emergency blanket for heat retention.
items.brp: +20% Survival in cold exposure scenarios.

items.name: Chem-Light Sticks (Pack of 10)
items.description: Snap-activated chemical light sticks in multiple colours.
items.brp: Silent route marking and low-profile signalling.

items.name: Mirror (Signal)
items.description: Unbreakable signal mirror with sighting hole.
stats: Signal up to 10km in clear daylight with Survival roll
items.brp: Low-tech long-range signalling backup.

items.name: Compass (Magnetic)
items.description: Liquid-filled compass for reliable bearing checks.
items.brp: +10% Navigate in unfamiliar or low-visibility routes.

items.name: Third Eye Viewer (Portable)
items.description: Handheld viewer for Third Eye and approved entertainment channels.
items.brp: Can influence reputation and SCL perception.

items.name: Camera (Still/Video)
items.description: Weather-sealed camera with night mode and evidence-grade tagging.
items.brp: +10% Forensics when scenes are properly documented.

items.name: Audio Recorder
items.description: Covert recorder with long-form capture.
items.brp: Conceal with Sleight of Hand; useful for intel evidence chains.

items.name: Holographic Projector (Personal)
items.description: Portable 3D projection for maps, briefs, and presentations.
items.brp: +10% Tactics during planning sessions with active holo display.

items.name: Playing Cards / Entertainment Kit
items.description: Compact downtime game set.
stats: Cards, dice, and micro game kit
items.brp: Supports morale and Gamble skill scenes.

items.name: Grooming Kit
items.description: One-month hygiene and grooming supplies.
items.brp: Can matter for social/sponsor-facing checks at GM discretion.

items.name: Evidence Bags (Pack of 20)
items.description: Tamper-resistant evidence storage bags.
items.brp: Required for full legal/corporate Forensics presentation quality.

items.name: Ammunition Box (Sealed)
items.description: Weatherproof/shockproof ammo storage case.
items.brp: Prevents moisture and handling degradation.

items.name: Equipment Case (Ruggedised)
items.description: Hard shell waterproof case for fragile equipment transport.
items.brp: Protects scanners, med gear, and electronics from transport damage.

items.name: Cybernetic Maintenance Kit
items.description: Field service kit for implant diagnostics, maintenance, and minor repairs.
stats: Includes tools, couplers, lubricants, and common replacement parts
items.brp: Required for Craft/Medicine (Cybernetics) without penalty; otherwise -40%.

items.name: Power Coupler (Cybernetic)
items.description: Universal charging coupler for cybernetic power systems.
stats: Connects implants to standard field power sources
items.brp: Required for rapid recharge of internal cybernetic power cells.

items.name: Interface Cable (Cybernetic to Computer)
items.description: Direct neural interface cable for high-speed data exchange.
items.brp: Direct interface can increase Electronics (Computer) task speed by x10.

items.name: Vehicle Repair Kit
items.description: Field repair supplies and tools for emergency vehicle maintenance.
stats: Supports 5 major repairs or 20 minor fixes
items.brp: Required for vehicle Craft (Mechanical) without penalty.

items.name: Vehicle Toolkit (Advanced)
items.description: Professional vehicle diagnostics, welding, and advanced repair suite.
items.brp: Supports major field repairs and modification work.

items.name: Magna-Clamp (Vehicle Tracking)
items.description: Magnetic encrypted GPS vehicle tracking device.
items.brp: Attach via Sleight of Hand/Stealth for remote tracking.

items.name: Flashbang Grenade
items.description: Stun grenade with intense flash and sonic blast.
stats: CON roll or stunned 1d3 rounds and sensory disruption 1d6 rounds
items.brp: Breaching and crowd-control staple; minimal structural damage.

items.name: Smoke Grenade
items.description: Dense smoke canister for LOS denial.
items.brp: Spot and ranged attacks through smoke at -50%; movement often halved.

items.name: Tear Gas Grenade
items.description: Chemical irritant dispersal for riot and area denial control.
stats: CON roll or 1d4 damage and -30% actions while exposed
items.brp: Most SLA teams use filtration but unprotected targets are heavily impaired.

items.name: Restraint Cuffs (Heavy Duty)
items.description: Hardened cuffs with biometric lock.
stats: STR vs 20 to break free (single attempt; failure causes 1d3 damage)
items.brp: Reliable detainee control tool for live-capture objectives.
